summary: Ran the S006 deliverability prerequisite, runtime, and permission gates. All executed checks passed, but final deliverability is not yet proven because source-backed implementable backlog remains. S007 and S008 were queued for the remaining work.
remaining_risks: Multi-instance coordination is still an implementable repo-owned gap and must be closed or explicitly reclassified by evidence.
Production remote-orphan governance is still an implementable repo-owned gap and must be closed or explicitly reclassified by evidence.
Final deliverability requires a rerun of S006-style broad gates after S007/S008.
